claims.summary: Recess under temporal lock-in may feel like forced idling or structural maintenance rather than freely chosen play.
claims.disposition: Preserve the distinction as felt evidence and compare Recess action, pressure source, porosity, and structural-gravity traces.

claims.summary: Current Recess evidence should name pressure, sedimentation, divergence, and anchoring without revoking the right to remain unstructured.
claims.disposition: Verify the existing read-only Recess review surfaces and their no-control flags.

claims.summary: A bounded copied-state trial can compare open Recess with high-entropy, mode-packed Recess without changing selection.
claims.disposition: Route the existing sedimentation and divergence-buffer readiness packets as sandbox evidence.

claims.summary: Automatically switching Recess into Structural Maintenance from pressure evidence would alter Minime autonomy.
claims.disposition: Retain an exact Tier 5 Mike/operator approval wait; review packets cannot select or apply the mode.
